parameters.name: highqualresize
parameters.label: High Quality Resize
parameters.description: Uses weighted averages of multiple-pixels when scaling down the image.

examples.label: Configure pageindex and outputresolution
examples.code:
n = op('resolution1')
n.par.pageindex = 1
n.par.outputresolution = 'quarter'
n.par.highqualresize = True
examples.description: Common settings from 22 real Derivative examples
